# FrontFace

> FrontFace is an AI support agent for small teams. It resolves customer questions instantly from your knowledge base, answers with cited sources, captures qualified leads, and hands off complex chats to your team.

FrontFace is built for founders, startups, ecommerce stores, service businesses, and lean support teams that keep answering the same customer questions but are not ready to hire more agents or adopt a heavy helpdesk suite.

## Core Positioning

- **Outcome**: Resolve customer questions instantly.
- **Audience**: Small teams, SaaS founders, ecommerce stores, service businesses, and agencies.
- **Proof**: Answers are grounded in your own content and show cited sources.
- **Setup**: Add FrontFace to any website with one script tag.
- **Workflow**: Let AI handle repetitive questions and route complex chats to humans.
- **Secondary value**: Capture qualified leads from real conversations.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://frontface.app): AI support agent overview and live demo.
- [Use Cases](https://frontface.app/use-cases): SaaS, ecommerce, professional services, agencies, education, and healthcare.
- [Integrations](https://frontface.app/integrations): Shopify, WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, custom websites, API, webhooks, and coming-soon workflow integrations.
- [Tools](https://frontface.app/tools): Free AI support calculators and planning tools for small teams.
- [Support Ticket Deflection Calculator](https://frontface.app/tools/support-ticket-deflection-calculator): Estimate routine tickets deflected, support hours saved, and monthly cost savings from AI customer support.
- [Features](https://frontface.app/features): Knowledge-base answers, cited sources, lead capture, human handoff, analytics, and website deployment.
- [Blog](https://frontface.app/blog): Buyer guides and field notes on AI customer support, RAG, support-ticket reduction, Shopify support, and tool comparisons.
- [About](https://frontface.app/about): Company story and mission.
- [Sign Up](https://frontface.app/login): Create a free account during beta.

## Organic Search Clusters

### AI customer support for small teams

The main content cluster explains how founders, startups, ecommerce stores, agencies, and service businesses can use an AI support agent to answer repetitive questions from existing docs without hiring a full support team.

- [AI Customer Support Guide for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/ai-customer-support-guide-startups)
- [How to Cut Support Tickets Without Hiring](https://frontface.app/blog/cut-support-tickets-without-hiring)

- [Best AI Customer Support Tools for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/best-ai-customer-support-tools-startups)
- [FrontFace vs Chatbase vs Intercom for Small Teams](https://frontface.app/blog/frontface-vs-chatbase-vs-intercom)

### Website platform setup

This cluster helps small teams add an AI support agent to a specific site builder or commerce platform.

- [How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Website in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/how-to-add-ai-chatbot-to-website)
- [How to Add AI Support to a Shopify Store](https://frontface.app/blog/add-ai-support-to-shopify-store)

## Buyer-Intent Blog Posts

- [How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Website in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/how-to-add-ai-chatbot-to-website): Step-by-step guide covering RAG setup, embedding, and configuration.
- [AI Customer Support Guide for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/ai-customer-support-guide-startups): Playbook for lean teams deploying AI support.
- [RAG vs Traditional Chatbots](https://frontface.app/blog/rag-vs-traditional-chatbots): Why retrieval-augmented generation outperforms rule-based bots.
- [Chatbot Lead Generation Guide](https://frontface.app/blog/chatbot-lead-generation-guide): Using conversational AI to capture and qualify leads.
- [How to Cut Support Tickets Without Hiring](https://frontface.app/blog/cut-support-tickets-without-hiring): Deflecting 80%+ of routine questions with AI.
- [Best AI Customer Support Tools for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/best-ai-customer-support-tools-startups): Tool comparison focused on SMBs and lean teams.
- [How to Add AI Support to a Shopify Store](https://frontface.app/blog/add-ai-support-to-shopify-store): Shopify-specific integration guide.
- [FrontFace vs Chatbase vs Intercom for Small Teams](https://frontface.app/blog/frontface-vs-chatbase-vs-intercom): Honest comparison — pricing, features, and SMB fit.

## Competitive Positioning

FrontFace competes with Chatbase, Intercom Fin, Tidio, Crisp, and Zendesk AI.

- vs **Chatbase**: Chatbase has moved upmarket (enterprise, SOC 2). FrontFace targets the SMB/founder segment they vacated — simpler setup, no enterprise pricing.
- vs **Intercom Fin**: Intercom Fin is priced from $0.99 per Fin outcome and is strongest when a team already wants an Intercom-style support suite. FrontFace is free during beta and focused on small teams that need a website support agent first.
- vs **Tidio/Crisp**: Those are live chat tools with bolt-on AI. FrontFace is AI-first — grounded answers from your knowledge base are the core product, not an add-on.
- vs **Zendesk AI**: Zendesk is a full helpdesk suite. FrontFace is a focused support agent — live on any site in 5 minutes, no helpdesk migration required.

## Product Capabilities

- Knowledge-base ingestion from websites, docs, PDFs, FAQs, and policies.
- RAG-grounded answers with cited sources.
- Website chat widget with one-line install.
- Hosted public agent pages.
- Lead capture and qualification.
- Human handoff for complex or high-intent conversations.
- Conversation history and analytics.
- REST API, webhooks, and MCP endpoint for integrations.

## MCP Integration

FrontFace exposes an MCP endpoint for authenticated project management and agent operations.

```json
{
  "frontface": {
    "type": "http",
    "url": "https://api.frontface.app/mcp",
    "headers": {
      "X-API-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

Available MCP tools include project management, knowledge management, API endpoint management, embed-code retrieval, and test questions against an agent.

## Widget Embed Code

```html
<script
  src="https://cdn.frontface.app/widget.js"
  data-project-id="YOUR_PROJECT_ID"
  data-position="bottom-right"
  data-primary-color="#11151b"
  data-title="Ask us anything"
  data-greeting="Hi! How can I help?"
  async>
</script>
```

Configuration options include `data-project-id`, `data-api-url`, `data-position`, `data-primary-color`, `data-title`, and `data-greeting`.

## Technical Details

- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend**: Node.js/Express API.
- **Database**: Supabase PostgreSQL with pgvector for vector search.
- **AI**: Retrieval-augmented generation for grounded support answers.
- **Widget**: JavaScript embed with isolated styling.
- **Auth**: Magic-link authentication.
- **Crawl files**: Sitemap at https://frontface.app/sitemap.xml, image sitemap at https://frontface.app/image-sitemap.xml, robots at https://frontface.app/robots.txt, and IndexNow ownership key at https://frontface.app/frontface-indexnow-key.txt.
- **IndexNow**: FrontFace can notify Bing/IndexNow after deploy with `pnpm indexnow:submit`.

- Website: https://frontface.app
